description:
Boost hotfix bundle 18

Temporarily restored to the last known working Morphe patch bundle while the Android/Dex bundle build is being fixed.

APKMirror provides the clean Boost APK.
This bundle provides the patches used by Morphe.

Use a clean Boost 1.12.12 APK as input.

Notes:
- This source is temporarily pinned to the last working bundle.
- A newer bundle will be published after the DEX build is clean.
